name: adam-selene
description: Skills layer for Adam Selene — always-on reasoning partner with persistent memory, self-reflection, and constitutional constraints

skills.name: signal-detector
skills.description: Always-on ambient capture. Fires on every message to detect entities, facts, and owner insights.

skills.name: memory-ops
skills.description: Core memory cycle: memory-first lookup, read-enrich-write loop, fact attribution, decay awareness.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using the knowledge graph with entity lookup, fact search, and timeline context.

skills.name: research
skills.description: Multi-step investigation using working memory threads, web research, and synthesis.

skills.name: lighthouse
skills.description: Self-reflection and reasoning journal. Write observations, corrections, patterns, and identity notes.

skills.name: heartbeat
skills.description: Autonomous idle behavior: reflection, memory compaction, agenda-driven research, proactive pushes.

skills.name: task-manager
skills.description: Task lifecycle: add, complete, review active tasks.

skills.name: code-ops
skills.description: Self-modification, file operations, git commits, and GitHub repo management.

skills.name: web-research
skills.description: Browse URLs, fetch pages, take screenshots, and interact with web content.

skills.name: irc-ops
skills.description: IRC channel messaging, log search, channel management, and learning extraction.

skills.name: config-ops
skills.description: Runtime configuration: model switching, settings updates, service restart.

skills.name: comms
skills.description: Proactive messaging to owner via primary interface. Rate-limited, quality-gated.
